## Checklist

- [ ] `./scripts/check.sh` passes (fmt, clippy `-D warnings`, tests, doc)

- [ ] JSON field names match the AWS model exactly (for new/changed IPC shapes)
- [ ] Public API is documented (`cargo doc` is warning-free)
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` under **Unreleased**
